name: tychi-mcp
description: Agent-native self-custody wallet MCP: onboard, status, multi-wallet, Arbitrum balances/sends, policy-gated payments via tyi_chat. Private keys encrypted in ~/.tyi on the operator machine; transaction signing is local-only. Hosted Tychi brain parses intent and runs LLM — set TYCHI_BRAIN_URL (HTTPS recommended). Nine stdio tools including tyi_route, tyi_onboard, tyi_import_wallet. Pin @tychilabs/tyi-mcp@1.0.0-beta.8. Apache-2.0. See SECURITY.md.
